problems.cause: AGREE requires constant declarations to be evaluatable at compile time, but the expression (ownLongitude > nearestIntruderLongitude) references input ports which are not compile-time constants
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the const declaration and inline the boolean expression directly in the guarantee conditions where it is used
